turns.content: What brings you in today?
My lower back's been killing me. I sit in my delivery van ten hours a day. Sometimes the pain shoots down my leg.
When did this start?
About a month ago. It's just been getting worse. Last week I couldn't even bend to grab packages from the back.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Right here, in the lower part. Some days it's a dull ache, other days sharp. When it goes down my leg, that's when I can't drive.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. Just the pain and the leg shooting. Nothing else.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just ibuprofen sometimes. Nothing else really helps. I got a bottle of blood pressure pills from my regular doctor, but that's it.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
High blood pressure, I guess. The other doctor told me that. I don't really think about it unless they bring it up.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No. I don't think so. Never had a problem with pills before.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I got a heating pad and take the ibuprofen. That's about it. Nothing really knocks it out.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Sitting makes it worse, that's for sure. Standing up or walking around a little helps, but I can't do that while I'm working.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
It's making my job a nightmare. I can barely lift boxes, and driving all day is just pure misery. My boss is gonna get sick of it soon.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
Yeah, I smoke. Maybe half a pack a day. And I drink beer after work, couple cans. Helps me sleep.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Dad had back trouble, yeah. Don't know what exactly. He never went to the doctor much. That's about all I can tell you.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
Yeah, once or twice over the years. But it always went away in a few days. This time it's not letting up.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically it's a solid 4, maybe 5 when it shoots down. Emotionally? I'm just sick of it. Don't think much about it beyond wanting it gone.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. That's about it. Just need something so I can get back to work.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I just push through. What else can I do? Beer after work, heating pad at night, and hope tomorrow's better.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Like I said, I just deal with it. Not much else to do.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I already told you. Pushing through, beer, heating pad. That's it.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I told you already. Just getting by. Beer and heat. What more do you want me to say?
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I'm getting real tired of repeating myself. I told you twice. Can we move on and figure out what to do about my back?
